Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|13645005&_include=Condition:patient

| Code | System | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `13645005` | SNOMED CT | Chronic obstructive lung disease (disorder) |
| `J44.0` | ICD-10-CM | COPD with acute lower respiratory infection |
| `J44.1` | ICD-10-CM | COPD with acute exacerbation |
